description: Restores 600 HP.
name: Healing Water

description: Restores 1,500 HP.
name: Pure Healing Water

description: Fully restores HP.
name: Super-Pure Healing Water

description:
Revives an ally and shields them from 1,000 damage for 
1 turn after revival.
name: Reviver

description:
Revives an ally and shields them from 5,000 damage for 
1 turn after revival.
name: Enhanced Reviver

description:
A sacred stone said to appear where spirits dwell. Revives an ally
and restores their HP, MP, and TP to 20%.
name: Spirit Stone

description:
A sacred stone said to appear where spirits dwell. Revives all allies
and fully restores HP, MP, and TP.
name: Spirit Soul Stone

description: A terrible-tasting weed, but it's edible. Restores 300 HP.
name: Sakura Leaf

description:
A frightening mushroom that actually tastes pretty good.
Restores 200 HP and 15 TP.
name: Rousing Mushroom

description: Six petals that each have their own taste. Restores 30% of HP.
name: Six Flowers

description:
A wild vegetable that contains 10 times the nutritional content of 
an onion. Restores 10% of HP and TP for 4 turns. (Battle only)
name: Whirl Root

description:
A high-class mushroom with an elegant flavor. Restores 1,000 HP 
and 20 TP.
name: Matsukaze Mushroom

description:
Only the small seeds on the surface of this grass are edible.
Restores 10% of MP.
name: Moon Grass

description: Restores 20% of MP.
name: Mana

description: Restores 40% of MP.
name: Limana

description: Fully restores MP.
name: Full Mana

description: Hard but can be eaten as is. Cures Poison.
name: Detox Seed

description:
Sacred powder that pacifies belligerent spirits. Halves the random 
encounter rate for a while.
name: Exorcism Powder

description:
Sacred powder that pacifies belligerent spirits. Eliminates random
encounters for a while.
name: Exorcism Stone

description:
A dried-out mushroom that tastes like medicine. Cures all of an 
ally's abnormalities and protects from them for 3 turns.
name: Remedy Mushroom

description:
A miraculous wind that heals both the body and soul. 
Cures all allies of any status abnormalities.
name: Golden Wind

description: Increases Max HP by 50.
name: Life Fragment

description: Increases Max MP by 10.
name: Soul Fragment

description: Increases Attack by 5.
name: Power Fragment

description: Increases Defense by 5.
name: Protection Fragment

description: Increases Magic by 5.
name: Mind Fragment

description: Increases Magic Defense by 5.
name: Reason Fragment

description: Increases Agility by 3.
name: Swiftness Fragment

description: Increases Luck by 3.
name: Fortune Fragment

description:
A book containing the histories of those who've overcome trials. 
Grants 500 EXP to an ally.
name: Book

description:
A book containing the histories of those who've overcome trials. 
Grants 2,000 EXP to an ally.
name: High Book

description:
A book containing the histories of those who've overcome trials.
Grants 5,000 EXP to an ally.
name: Mega Book

description:
A book containing the histories of those who've overcome trials. 
Grants 20,000 EXP to an ally.
name: Giga Book

description:
A book containing the histories of those who've overcome trials. 
Grants 66,666 EXP to an ally.
name: Tera Book

description:
Increases Max HP by 50, Max MP by 10, and Attack, Defense, Magic, 
and Magic Defense by 5.
name: Proof of Lordship

description:
An esoteric medicine made long ago. The method of creation has 
been lost to time. Restores 2,500 HP to all allies.
name: Healing Mist

description:
A poem written by the Demon Lord to awaken his Apostle.
Toggles Deathpolca between her normal and Apostle states.
name: Poem of Flowers

description:
Can withstand even heavy damage with 1 HP remaining for 2 turns.
Can't survive an attack when at 1 HP.
name: Endurance Drug

description:
A scroll written by one who has attained mastery of their path. 
Slightly increases the rate of Back Attack Slashes. (Can stack)
name: Ultimate Scroll

description: Allows 1 use of teleportation magic. Sends you to the return point.
name: Return Scroll

description:
The sound of nostalgic tears echo and open the way back.
Can be used as much as desired from the menu.
name: Hometown Ocarina

description:
Creates a piercing sound that lures enemies. Can be used as much 
as desired from the menu.
name: Battle Ocarina

description:
The currency of DoReMi Fuckingdom. It's the only accepted form of
payment within the kingdom.
name: Fuckoin

description:
A magical image that reveals the location of Bohelos's hidden
treasures. Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Bohelos>

description:
Special information on a particularly strong enemy in Tortas. 
When used from the Items menu, the target is weakened.
name: Strong Enemy Information <Tortas>

description:
Depicts the manager of DoReMi Fuckingdom. Can be viewed at any 
time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <M>

description:
Depicts a shy Polca as she first arrives at the kingdom. 
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo

description:
Depicts a shy Ange as she first arrives at the kingdom. 
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <A>

description:
Depicts a shy Kalinka as she first arrives at the kingdom. 
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <K>

description:
Depicts a shy Sarasa as she first arrives at the kingdom. 
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <S>

description:
Depicts an embarrassed Diana as she first arrives at the kingdom.
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <D>

description:
Depicts a flustered Naje as he first arrives at the kingdom.
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <N>

description:
Depicts an amused Lily as she first arrives at the kingdom.
Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <L>

description:
Special information about Ghost Town Karin. Can be checked at any 
time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Karin>

description:
Special information about the Forest of Phantoms. Can be checked
at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Forest of Phantoms>

description:
Contains a code used to open a treasure chest in Bohelos.
Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Bohelos>

description:
Contains a code used to open a treasure chest in Shingana.
Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Shingana>

description:
Special information about the fallen Kingdom of Lace.
Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Lace>

description:
Special information on a particular dragon in Tolkia. When used 
from the Items menu, the target is weakened.
name: Strong Enemy Information <Tolkia>

description:
Special information on a particularly powerful archmage. 
When used from the Items menu, the target is weakened.
name: Strong Enemy Information <Orphe>
note:
特急法術士
ダイアナ

description:
Special information on a particular magical organism. When used
from the Items menu, the target is weakened.
name: Strong Enemy Information <Rooklook>
note:
職員室の魔法生物
サラーサ

description:
Contains a code used to open a treasure chest in the Third Empire.
Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <The Third Empire>

description:
Contains a code used to open a treasure chest in Pacius.
Can be checked at any time from the Items menu.
name: Hidden Treasure Information <Pacius>

description:
A picture that can be obtained when an actress's arousal reaches 
its peak. Can be viewed at any time from the Items menu.
name: Celebrity Photo <SS>

description:
A strange, jiggly substance dropped by monsters. 
Only good for selling.
name: Jiggly Jelly

description:
Rich in nutrients from the earth, tomatoes have a 
strong, sweet taste.
name: Tomato

description:
Rich in nutrients from the earth, radishes have a 
strong, sweet taste.
name: Radish

description:
Rich in nutrients from the earth, pumpkins have a 
strong, sweet taste.
name: Pumpkin

description:
A monster's fang that contains venomous components. 
Only good for selling.
name: Poison Fang

description: A bone dropped by a monster. Only good for selling.
name: Bone

description: A sharp fang dropped by a monster. Only good for selling.
name: Sharp Fang

description: Proof of slaying a dragon. Only good for selling.
name: Dragon Fang

description: A 5.56mm magazine.
name: Machine Gun Bullet

description: A shell for a 12-gauge shotgun.
name: Shotgun Shell

description: A 84mm molded explosive.
name: Rocket

description: A complete set of missiles, launchers, and batteries for a Javelin.
name: Javelin Ammo

description:
Cock of a male Palo dragon. Used in nourishing medicine. They've
become somewhat rare and are in high demand in certain places.
name: Dragon Dick

description:
A key for the dungeon in the Kingdom of Tortas. This one's for the 
most dangerous prisoner.
name: Important Prison Key

description:
A key for the old fort in Shingana. The doors are always locked to 
prevent prisoners of war and slave soldiers from escaping.
name: Shingana's Old Fort Key

description:
A secret key for the old fort in Shingana. Its purpose is to open an 
escape route for the king in unforeseen circumstances.
name: Secret Shingana's Old Fort Key

description:
Used to get through the coliseum's desert area. Easily distinguished
by its light-red color.
name: Red Water

description:
Used to get through the coliseum's desert area. Easily distinguished 
by its light-blue color.
name: Blue Water

description:
Used to get through the coliseum's desert area. Easily distinguished 
by its light-green color.
name: Green Water

description:
A key used in Magic Barrier Rooklook. Students aren't allowed 
to use it.
name: 263rd Ward Key

description:
A key used in the Land of Sacrifice, Orphe. Opens an escape hatch 
in the watchtower.
name: Watchtower Key

description:
A bat-shaped key for the old fort in Shingana. 
Used to access the stairwell.
name: Shingana's Old Fort Bat Key

description: A key to the Great Magic Prison in Maximus. Unlocks the west area.
name: West Key of the Great Magic Prison
note: 中層の立ち読みコーナーかくし

description: A key to the Great Magic Prison in Maximus. Unlocks the east area.
name: East Key of the Great Magic Prison
note: 魔法騎士団団長をたおす

description: A key used to access Bohelos's dungeon.
name: Bohelos Dungeon Key

description: A key for the door of light in Mark 6's control room.
name: Access Key

description: A key that can be used in the Radiant Tower.
name: Radiant Tower Key

description: A secret key that can be used in the Radiant Tower.
name: Secret Radiant Tower Key

description:
A secret potion made in Kumin that turns clothes invisible.
There's enough for 6 people.
name: See-Throughify

description:
A key used in Rooklook's underground classrooms. 
Unlocks the punishment room.
name: Punishment Room Key

description:
A dagger found in a small hall in the Third Empire.
It doesn't seem to be made for combat.
name: Oddly Heavy Dagger

description: A key to the Third Empire's battle stage.
name: Battle Stage Key

description: A key used in the admonition area of the Underground Temple.
name: Key of Admonition

description: A key used in the instruction area of the Underground Temple.
name: Key of Instruction

description: A small key used in the instruction area of the Underground Temple.
name: Model of Instruction Key
note:
地下神殿のカギ３
リリィ実験室

description: A key used in the eternity area of the Underground Temple.
name: Key of Eternity

description: A small key used in the eternity area of the Underground Temple.
name: Model of Eternity Key
note:
地下神殿のカギ３
リリィ実験室

description: A key used in the Imperial Citadel.
name: Imperial Citadel Key

description: A key used in the Prison of Warning. Very fragile.
name: Key of Warning
note: 階層ごとに所持から消せば一種でOK

description:
A small bottle that became murky at some point. Just barely revives 
a fallen ally.
name: Murky Reviver
note: ダンジョン後に所持数をー９９して、次回に持ち越させない。

description: A used, discarded scroll. Can seal powerful monsters. (Battle item)
name: Discarded Scroll
note:
ダンジョン後に所持数をー９９して、次回に持ち越させない。
速度補正なし、仲間も攻撃できる（みつご特攻

description: An old, decayed dagger made of unknown material. (Battle item)
name: Decaying Dagger
note:
ダンジョン後に所持数をー９９して、次回に持ち越しなし。
最速攻撃

description:
Was once an endurance drug. Inflicts severe aftereffects on the 
user's body. Will survive strong damage with 1 HP.
name: Dangerous Poison
note: ダンジョン後に所持数をー９９して、次回に持ち越させない。

description: A voucher for a luxurious hotel in Plana.
name: Premium Hotel Voucher
